hangTight: Hang tight! We're getting everything ready for you...
rewardingExperience: Embark on a rewarding experience with our Loyalty Dashboard!
beginJourney: Begin your journey by effortlessly adding a Pass Type ID and kick-start your personalized loyalty programme.
simplicity: Discover the simplicity of getting started and enjoy exclusive benefits tailored just for you.

wouldYouLike: What would you like to know about your loyalty programme?
